name: consensus-rnd-spec
description: Consensus R&D loop with Spec Kitty and native consensus backends

interface.shortDescription: Unattended Consensus R&D with Spec Kitty routing.
interface.longDescription: Runs a Consensus R&D controller that auto-detects whether a host repository uses Spec Kitty. Spec Kitty repositories route discovery into missions and work packages; other repositories may fall back to the native consensus-rnd loop when explicitly enabled.
defaultPrompt: /loop 10min /consensus-rnd-spec keep the unattended Consensus R&D loop running for this repo.
